package rulecoverage

func PositiveJsonMarshaledManuallyThenCData() string {
    ruleID := "json_marshaled_manually_then_c_data"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that manually marshal JSON and then write it through gin.Context.Data(...)."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
